parameter_origin: fixed diagnostic grid after reviewing session0 OOF state trajectories

strategy_semantics.factorization: stage2 commit threshold crossed with independent stage1 WAIT_IDLE reset threshold and confirmation length
strategy_semantics.stage1_score: sigmoid of alpha0.5 EWMA over task_logit-minus-idle_logit
strategy_semantics.stage2_score: softmax of candidate-local alpha0.5 EWMA over per-window centered logits
strategy_semantics.candidate_history: excludes opening window and clears on every candidate exit and segment boundary
strategy_semantics.reset_history: counts qualifying windows only while WAIT_IDLE and clears on failure, reset, or segment boundary
strategy_semantics.decision_time: window stop at native 250 Hz with 500-sample windows and 125-sample steps
strategy_semantics.truth_usage: labels and event boundaries are used only after inference for metrics and timing attribution
